algoActions: dwell + click (fold ends on the isolated 'It moved.')
follow_author (the account that posts the move in real time — following = seeing the next move)
photo_expand (live board screenshot is the proof)
hero.negativeSignalAudit: No side taken against anyone; the US-money move is reported as fact, which US fans LIKE hearing. Nothing to mute.
hero.continuity: Keeps the noon hero's explicit promise ('if the money swings, I'll post the flip'); grades nothing prematurely; sets up the night recap.
hero.screenshot: Live dashboard with tonight's slate visible ('the board is the truth' — show the board)
hero.text:
At noon I said that if the money moved on USA–Belgium, I'd post it.

It moved.

The proven wallets were 8-6 Belgium this morning. Since then the US side has been pulling in winning money — it's a coin flip now, 8-9. Our Belgium position stays small, and stays live until it locks at 7:45.

The rest of the evening board is louder:

• Houston Astros ML +115 — 4 units, our biggest of the night. First pitch 6:46.
• Milwaukee Brewers ML -108 — 4 units, 7:46.
• Arizona Diamondbacks ML +108 — 2.5 units, 9:41.

Spain already cashed this afternoon. The night card decides the day.

Everything moves until 15 minutes before start. The board is the truth, not this tweet.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: For the new people from today: we track the small group of bettors who actually win long-term. When their money moves, our board moves — that's the whole product. Live until each game locks: nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0706e
hero.postWindow: 6:10–6:20 PM ET — inside Astros' 60-min window, before the evening games swallow attention

doNotDo: Do NOT say the Belgium pick flipped — the board still holds Belgium; report the money move, not a reversed call
Re-run socialBoard.mjs right before posting — if numbers moved again, update the 8-9 split
Don't quote the Phillies result — not graded in verified records yet
Soccer record: user already posted '11-4 last 7 days' — don't introduce a conflicting window tonight
